title: Loader
description: A loading indicator component used to show that content or data is being loaded or processed.
summary: A loading indicator component used to show that content or data is being loaded or processed.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Loader` works.

<LoaderDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Loader` component.

<LoaderDemosConfigurator />

## Options Usage

### Composite

```ts
import { Loader } from "@/ui/loader";

export function LoaderDemo() {
  return <Loader variant="spinner" size={12} color="hsl(var(--constructive))" />;
}
```

### Direct Component

```ts
import { LoaderSpinner } from "@/ui/loader";

export function LoaderDemo() {
  return <LoaderSpinner size={12} color="hsl(var(--constructive))" />;
}
```

---

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type T = "saturation" | "body" | "slider" | "root" | "sliders" | "sliderOverlay" | "thumb" | "saturationOverlay" | "swatches" | "swatch" | "preview" | "alphaOverlay" | "shadowOverlay" | "colorOverlay" | "childrenOverlay";
```

| Styles API    | Type                                | Default     | Annotation                                    |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`   | `Partial<Record<T, boolean>>`       | `false`     | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<T, string>>`        | `undefined` | Set className for `T`                         |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<T, CSSProperties>>` | `undefined` | Set style for `T`                             |

### Props API

| Props API     | Type                                                                   | Default             | Annotation        |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- | ----------------- |
| variant`?`    | `"spinner" \| "orbit" \| "clockwise" \| "dots" \| "buffer" \| "rises"` | `spinner`           | variant of loader |
| unstyled`?`   | `keys object by variant`                                               | `undefined`         |                   |
| classNames`?` | `keys object by variant`                                               | `undefined`         |                   |
| styles`?`     | `keys object by variant`                                               | `undefined`         |                   |
| color`?`      | `React.CSSProperties["color"] \| "currentColor" \| (string & {})`      | `hsl(var(--color))` |                   |
| size`?`       | `string \| number`                                                     | `20px`              |                   |
| duration`?`   | `number`                                                               | `1.2`               |                   |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="loader" />

`,(0,e.jsx)(s,{name:"loader",code:`import * as React from "react";\r
import { ocx } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
type SubKeys = {\r
  spinner: "root" | "bar";\r
  orbit: "root" | "inner" | "orbit";\r
  clockwise: "root" | "clockwise";\r
  dots: "root" | "dots";\r
  buffer: "root" | "buffer";\r
  rises: "root" | "rises";\r
};\r
\r
type classes = {\r
  [K in keyof SubKeys]: Record<SubKeys[K], string>;\r
};\r
\r
type __Loader = keyof SubKeys;\r
type __Selector<T extends __Loader> = keyof classes[T];\r
type StylesNames<T extends __Loader> = {\r
  unstyled?: Partial<Record<__Selector<T>, boolean>>;\r
  className?: string;\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
  classNames?: Partial<Record<SubKeys[T], string>>;\r
  styles?: Partial<Record<__Selector<T>, React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any }>>;\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"] | "currentColor";\r
  size?: string | number;\r
  duration?: number;\r
};\r
\r
type LoaderSyntheticProps<K extends __Loader, T extends React.ElementType = "div", Exclude extends string = never> = StylesNames<K> & Omit<React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<T>, "style" | "color" | Exclude>;\r
\r
function clamp(value: number, precision: number = 1): number {\r
  const factor = Math.pow(10, precision);\r
  return Math.round(value * factor) / factor;\r
}\r
\r
function getStyles<T extends __Loader>(loader: T, selector: __Selector<T>, options?: StylesNames<T>) {\r
  const dynamicStyles = ["duration", "color", "size"].reduce(\r
    (acc, key) => {\r
      const value = options?.[key as keyof typeof options];\r
      if (value !== undefined) {\r
        acc[\`--\${loader}-\${key}\`] = key === "duration" ? \`\${clamp(value as number)}s\` : key === "size" && typeof value === "number" ? \`\${value}px\` : String(value);\r
      }\r
      return acc;\r
    },\r
    {} as Record<string, string>\r
  );\r
  return {\r
    "data-loader": loader,\r
    [\`data-\${loader}\`]: selector,\r
    className: cn({ "stylelayer-loader": selector === "root" }, !options?.unstyled?.[selector], options?.classNames?.[selector], options?.className),\r
    style: ocx(dynamicStyles, options?.styles?.[selector], options?.style)\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export const LoaderSpinner = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"spinner">>(function LoaderSpinner(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "20px", color, duration = 1.2, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"spinner">("spinner", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      {[...Array(12)].map((_, index) => (\r
        <div\r
          key={index}\r
          {...getStyles<"spinner">("spinner", "bar", {\r
            unstyled,\r
            classNames,\r
            style: {\r
              "--child-delay": \`\${clamp(-duration - index / -10)}s\`,\r
              transform: \`rotate(\${clamp(30 * index)}deg) translate(146%)\`\r
            },\r
            styles\r
          })}\r
        />\r
      ))}\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
LoaderSpinner.displayName = "LoaderSpinner";\r
\r
export const LoaderOrbit = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"orbit">>(function LoaderOrbit(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "3rem", color, duration = 1.2, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, children, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"orbit">("orbit", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      <div {...getStyles<"orbit">("orbit", "inner", { unstyled, classNames, styles })}>\r
        {[...Array(2)].map((_, index) => (\r
          <div key={index} {...getStyles<"orbit">("orbit", "orbit", { unstyled, classNames, styles })} />\r
        ))}\r
      </div>\r
      {children}\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
\r
export const LoaderClockWise = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"clockwise">>(function LoaderClockWise(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "3rem", color, duration = 1.2, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"clockwise">("clockwise", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      {[...Array(2)].map((_, index) => (\r
        <div key={index} {...getStyles<"clockwise">("clockwise", "clockwise", { unstyled, classNames, styles })} />\r
      ))}\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
\r
export const LoaderDots = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"dots">>(function LoaderDots(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "3rem", color, duration = 1.2, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"dots">("dots", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      {[...Array(4)].map((_, index) => (\r
        <div\r
          key={index}\r
          {...getStyles<"dots">("dots", "dots", {\r
            unstyled,\r
            classNames,\r
            styles,\r
            style: { "--dots-delay": \`\${clamp(0.2 * index)}s\` }\r
          })}\r
        />\r
      ))}\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
\r
export const LoaderBuffer = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"buffer">>(function LoaderBuffer(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "3rem", color, duration = 1, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"buffer">("buffer", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      {[...Array(5)].map((_, index) => (\r
        <div\r
          key={index}\r
          {...getStyles<"buffer">("buffer", "buffer", {\r
            unstyled,\r
            classNames,\r
            styles,\r
            style: { "--buffer-delay": \`\${clamp(((index + 1) / 5) * duration)}s\` }\r
          })}\r
        />\r
      ))}\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
\r
export const LoaderRises = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderSyntheticProps<"rises">>(function LoaderRises(_props, ref) {\r
  const { size = "3rem", color, duration = 1, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div {...{ ref, ...getStyles<"rises">("rises", "root", { size, color, duration, unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles }), ...props }}>\r
      <span className="sr-only hidden" />\r
    </div>\r
  );\r
});\r
\r
export type LoaderProps =\r
  | ({ variant?: "spinner" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"spinner">)\r
  | ({ variant?: "orbit" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"orbit">)\r
  | ({ variant?: "clockwise" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"clockwise">)\r
  | ({ variant?: "dots" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"dots">)\r
  | ({ variant?: "buffer" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"buffer">)\r
  | ({ variant?: "rises" } & LoaderSyntheticProps<"rises">);\r
\r
const loaderMap = {\r
  spinner: LoaderSpinner,\r
  orbit: LoaderOrbit,\r
  clockwise: LoaderClockWise,\r
  dots: LoaderDots,\r
  buffer: LoaderBuffer,\r
  rises: LoaderRises\r
} as const;\r
\r
export const Loader = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LoaderProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { variant = "spinner", ...props } = _props;\r
  const Component = loaderMap[variant];\r
  return <Component ref={ref} {...(props as LoaderSyntheticProps<typeof variant>)} />;\r
}) as LoaderComponent;\r
Loader.displayName = "Loader";\r
\r
// Export as a composite component\r
type ForwardRef<T extends React.ElementType, Props> = React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<{ ref?: React.ComponentPropsWithRef<T>["ref"] } & Props>;\r
type LoaderComponent = ForwardRef<"div", LoaderProps> & {\r
  Spinner: typeof LoaderSpinner;\r
  Orbit: typeof LoaderOrbit;\r
  ClockWise: typeof LoaderClockWise;\r
  Dots: typeof LoaderDots;\r
  Buffer: typeof LoaderBuffer;\r
  Rises: typeof LoaderRises;\r
};\r
// Attach sub-components\r
Loader.Spinner = LoaderSpinner;\r
Loader.Orbit = LoaderOrbit;\r
Loader.ClockWise = LoaderClockWise;\r
Loader.Dots = LoaderDots;\r

Loader.Rises = LoaderRises;`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/components/loader.tsx",css:`/* loader */\r
@layer base {\r
  .stylelayer-loader {\r
    &[data-loader="spinner"] {\r
      @apply relative flex items-center justify-center flex-nowrap text-transparent appearance-none size-[--spinner-size,20px] min-h-[--spinner-size,20px] min-w-[--spinner-size,20px] max-h-[--spinner-size,20px] max-w-[--spinner-size,20px];\r
      & [data-spinner="bar"] {\r
        @apply h-[8%] w-[24%] absolute rounded-full bg-[--spinner-color,#757575] [animation:spinloader_var(--spinner-duration)_linear_var(--child-delay)_infinite];\r
      }\r
    }\r
    &[data-loader="orbit"] {\r
      @apply relative flex flex-wrap content-center items-center justify-center size-[calc(var(--orbit-size)*1.333)] [&>svg]:size-[calc(var(--orbit-size)*1.111)] [&>svg]:text-[--orbit-color,#757575];\r
      & [data-orbit="inner"] {\r
        @apply absolute animate-[rotate_2s_linear_0s_infinite_normal_none_running];\r
      }\r
      & [data-orbit="orbit"] {\r
        @apply absolute size-[--orbit-size] bg-[--orbit-color,#757575] rounded-full animate-[transformSpare_var(--orbit-duration)_linear_infinite_none_running] first:top-0 first:right-0 first:[--from:scale(0.5)] first:[--to:scale(0)] last:bottom-0 last:left-0 last:[--from:scale(0)] last:[--to:scale(0.5)] last:[animation-direction:reverse];\r
      }\r
    }\r
    &[data-loader="clockwise"] {\r
      @apply relative flex flex-wrap content-center items-center justify-center size-[--clockwise-size] bg-transparent rounded-full outline [outline-width:--outline] outline-offset-[--outline] outline-[--clockwise-color,#757575] [--outline:calc(var(--clockwise-size)/24)];\r
      & [data-clockwise="clockwise"] {\r
        @apply absolute size-full rounded-full flex flex-wrap content-center items-center justify-center [--space:calc((var(--clockwise-size)*4.17)/100)] [--initial-size:calc((var(--clockwise-size)/2)+var(--space))] [--w:calc((var(--clockwise-size)*8.334)/100)] [--top:calc(var(--initial-size)-var(--h))] [animation:rotate_var(--duration,var(--clockwise-duration))_linear_var(--clockwise-delay,0s)_infinite_var(--clockwise-property,normal)_forwards_running];\r
        &:first-child {\r
          @apply [--h:calc(var(--initial-size)-var(--w))] [--duration:calc(var(--clockwise-duration)*6)];\r
        }\r
        &:last-child {\r
          @apply [--h:calc((var(--initial-size)))];\r
        }\r
        &::before {\r
          @apply absolute z-[1] rounded-full content-[''] top-[--top] bg-[--clockwise-color,#757575] h-[--h] w-[--w];\r
        }\r
      }\r
    }\r
    &[data-loader="dots"] {\r
      @apply flex flex-wrap flex-row items-center justify-between content-center h-[calc(var(--dots-size)/2)] w-[--dots-size];\r
      & [data-dots="dots"] {\r
        @apply inline-block bg-[--dots-color,#757575] size-[calc(var(--dots-size)/5)] rounded-full animate-[dotsloader_var(--dots-duration)_linear_var(--dots-delay)_infinite_normal_both_running];\r
      }\r
    }\r
    &[data-loader="buffer"] {\r
      @apply relative [--from:--buffer-size] [--to:calc(var(--buffer-size)/4)] flex flex-nowrap flex-row items-center justify-between size-[--buffer-size];\r
      & [data-buffer="buffer"] {\r
        @apply inline-block w-[calc(var(--buffer-size)/8.75)] h-[calc(var(--buffer-size)/1)] bg-[--buffer-color,#757575] rounded-full [animation:heightSpare_var(--buffer-duration)_ease_var(--buffer-delay)_infinite_normal_both_running];\r
      }\r
    }\r
    &[data-loader="rises"] {\r
      @apply relative flex items-center justify-center size-[--rises-size];\r
      &::before,\r
      &::after {\r
        @apply content-[''] absolute size-full border-solid border-[--rises-color,#757575] rounded-full [animation:rotate_var(--rises-duration)_linear_var(--rises-delay,0s)_infinite_var(--rises-property)_forwards_running];\r
      }\r
      &::before {\r
        @apply size-full border-[calc(var(--rises-size)/8)] border-t-transparent [--rises-property:normal];\r
      }\r
      &::after {\r
        @apply size-[60%] border-[calc(var(--rises-size)/12)] border-b-transparent [--rises-property:reverse] opacity-20;\r
      }\r
    }\r
  }\r
\r
  @keyframes spinloader {\r
    from {\r
      opacity: 1;\r
    }\r
    to {\r
      opacity: 0.15;\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @keyframes rotate {\r
    to {\r
      transform: rotate(1turn);\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @keyframes heightSpare {\r
    from,\r
    to {\r
      height: var(--from);\r
    }\r
    50% {\r
      height: var(--to);\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @keyframes transformSpare {\r
    from,\r
    to {\r
      transform: var(--from);\r
    }\r
    50% {\r
      transform: var(--to);\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @keyframes transformEntire {\r
    from {\r
      transform: var(--from);\r
    }\r
    to {\r
      transform: var(--to);\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @keyframes dotsloader {\r
    50% {\r
      transform: scale(0.5);\r
      opacity: 0;\r
    }\r
    100% {\r
      transform: scale(1);\r
      opacity: 1;\r
